Class AdminManager

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems.AdminManager
public class AdminManager extends Object
Class to manage the Admins within the Server this makes it so we can seperate admin and player profiles to prevent cheating, if it's just a little harder and a bit more public people are less likely to cheat

  • Method Details

    • getProfile

      public static AdminManager.AdminProfile getProfile(UUID uuid)
      Returns the AdminProfile for a given UUID.
      Parameters:
      uuid - of a given player
      Returns:
      null if UUID does not have an admin profile or AdminManager.AdminProfile if it does

    • isSystemAdmin

      public static boolean isSystemAdmin(UUID uuid)
      Returns true if the given UUID is a recognized system admin.
      Parameters:
      uuid - of a given player
      Returns:
      true if UUID is a recognized system admin, false otherwise

    • isSudo

      public static boolean isSudo(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns true if the given UUID is a recognized system admin and is in admin mode.
      Parameters:
      player - of a given player
      Returns:
      true if UUID is a recognized system admin and is in admin mode, false otherwise

    • toggleSudo

      public static void toggleSudo(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Toggles sudo mode for the given player.
      Parameters:
      player - of a given player

    • handleJoin

      public static void handleJoin(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Restores admin status on join if the player was in sudo mode.
      Parameters:
      player - Player to restore admin status for

    • savePlayerState

      public static void savePlayerState(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.NamespacedKey key)

    • loadPlayerState

      public static void loadPlayerState(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.NamespacedKey key)
      Loading a players state after swapping from sudo mode or into sudo mode
      Parameters:
      player - Player to load the state for
      key - Key to load the state from
